ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "mls_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property listing */,
  "list_price" REAL /* Listing price of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "baths" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sq_ft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community where the property is located */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the listing (e.g., active, sold) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of amenities (e.g., pool, gym) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent listing the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the community */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the community */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the community */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district the community belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Real estate agency the agent works with */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Agent's license number */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the agent's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "mls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being inquired about */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or details of the inquiry */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., pending, replied) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was responded to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_mls_id FOREIGN KEY ("mls_id") REFERENCES properties ("mls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method of the client (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "budget_range" TEXT /* Client's budget range (e.g., $500K-$700K) */,
  "desired_move_in_date" TEXT /* Client's desired move-in date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_houses" (
  "open_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open house */,
  "mls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being shown at the open house */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the open house */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the open house */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the open house */,
  "attendees_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the open house */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent hosting the open house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_mls_id FOREIGN KEY ("mls_id") REFERENCES properties ("mls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "mls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was completed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who bought the property */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_mls_id FOREIGN KEY ("mls_id") REFERENCES properties ("mls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "mls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the image should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_mls_id FOREIGN KEY ("mls_id") REFERENCES properties ("mls_id")
)
